citations.narrative:
The research facility did not submit their Annual Report for the fiscal year 2025 to the Deputy Administrator by the
extended deadline date of December 31, 2026.
Reporting research facilities shall submit an annual report to the Deputy Administrator on or before December 1st of each
calendar year. The report shall include the number of animals used during the previous Federal fiscal year. Timely
submission of the annual report is essential to provide an accurate account of the total number of animals used and to
ensure that professionally acceptable standards governing the care and use of animals were followed during the previous
Federal fiscal year. The research facility needs to submit their USDA Fiscal Year 2025 Annual Report.
Correct by May 26, 2026.
Corrected on May 18, 2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative.
n

narrative:
2.36(a) 
   
Annual report. 
The research facility did not submit their Annual Report for the fiscal year 2025 to the Deputy Administrator by the 
extended deadline date of December 31, 2026. 
 
Reporting research facilities shall submit an annual report to the Deputy Administrator on or before December 1st of each 
calendar year. The report shall include the number of animals used during the previous Federal fiscal year. Timely 
submission of the annual report is essential to provide an accurate account of the total number of animals used and to 
ensure that professionally acceptable standards governing the care and use of animals were followed during the previous 
Federal fiscal year. The research facility needs to submit their USDA Fiscal Year 2025 Annual Report.  
 
Correct by May 26, 2026. 
Corrected on May 18, 2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative.
